title: Vanilla texture fix
description: fixes some issues with Minecraft's textures and 3D models such as 2D and floating rails, floating wall signs, etc.
body:
![icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b10575375162a6057d90c77df77393fb26dcd95_0.webp)
# About
**This resource pack fixes some issues with Minecraft's textures and 3D models and adds small tweaks for a better gameplay.**

<details>
<summary>Current changes made by this pack</summary>
<details>
<summary>Rails</summary>

All types of rails are by default 2D and they're also floating 1 pixel above the surface of the block beneath them. this pack fixes that by making rails 3D.

<details>
<summary>Show images</summary>
<details>
<summary>Default</summary>

![default rail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7e11eee19f6c718f3a12a081a345595071b8fe2.png)
</details>
<details>
<summary>This pack</summary>

![fixed rail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4dbd3acd5ae90c6789f00885dd97e46ebb301e0.png)
</details>
</details>
</details>
<details>
<summary>Ladder</summary>

Ladders have just about the same problems as rails.
### Note:
when using this resource pack, ladders seem to have a darker texture compared to the vanilla texture, but as far as I know this is an issue with Minecraft's lighting system and there is no problem with the 3D model or the texture in this resource pack.

<details>
<summary>Show images</summary>
<details>
<summary>Default</summary>

![default ladder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/822ab17a20c1fd4071fe155a10deab4f036c1519.png)
</details>
<details>
<summary>This pack</summary>

![fixed ladder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a158ef8af87455ed8aa7d27130836a57bb2686f0.png)

</details>
</details>
</details>
<details>
<summary>Signs</summary>

When signs are placed on the side of a block, there is a 0.5 pixel gap between the sign and the block. This resource pack fixes this problem by changing the 3D model of signs. However, as signs are entities, this part of the resource pack doesn't work without [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) or [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features).

<details>
<summary>Show images</summary>

<details>
<summary>Default</summary>

![default sign](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5f6d1c8ca78950122a7a3b3dfb0e51ec7da210f.png)

</details>
<details>
<summary>This pack</summary>

![fixed sign](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b46de738a01689b3a652f0ef1844637597cdd1a6.png)

</details>
</details>
</details>
<details>
<summary>GUI</summary>

The default background of the player(or horse) charecter in some GUIs(like the inventory) is black and feels inconsistent. This resource pack fixes that by changing the the color of that part of the GUI.

<details>
<summary>Show images</summary>
<details>
<summary>Default</summary>

![default player character background in inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ca7bfde0783dc45f2ab506ba68efafc876a1d07.png)

</details>
<details>
<summary>This pack</summary>

![fixed player character background in inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a4de9c23446cfc43fd8411cda00b50e19aedfe2.png)

</details>
</details>
</details>

<details>
<summary>Leaves</summary>

The texture of the other sides of all leaves are not visible through the gaps in the vanilla game. This resource pack fixes this issue by changing the 3D model of leaves.

Note: [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling) will not visualy effect this pack, but enabling "Fast" mode leaves culling might still improve performance.

<details>
<summary>Show images</summary>

<details>
<summary>Default</summary>

![Default leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00780efbc64f37020d2669a7f226011e36609aab.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>This pack</summary>

![Fixed leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9575d08d131aff01ad7f65c068f769ef79faffa8.png)

</details>
</details>
</details>
</details>


<details>
<summary>Coming soon</summary>

These are the problems I've found and I'm currently working on. If you've found other problems with Minecraft's default textures or models, please let me know in [my Discord server](https://discord.gg/QE9KnhzD).

<details>
<summary>Vines and leaf litters</summary>

Vines and leaf litters have the same problems as ladders and I'll fix that soon.

</details>
<details>
<summary>Banners</summary>

Banners have the same problems as signs and I'm trying to fix that, but because of a bug, fixing this will take longer than expected.

</details>
</details>

## Attention!
**Some parts of this resource pack requires [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) or [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) to work!**
